---
id: enable-compute-env
title: "Enable compute environment"
description: "Enables the compute environment identified by the given `computeEnvId`. An enabled compute environment can be used to launch workflows."
sidebar_label: "Enable compute environment"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Enable compute environment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/compute-envs/{computeEnvId}/enable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enables the compute environment identified by the given `computeEnvId`. An enabled compute environment can be used to launch workflows.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
